snippet.title: Sachin को आमाको समेत अर्कै श्रीमान रहेछन, धुरुधुरु रुदै खोलिन सबै बास्तबिकता, पहिला किन झुट बोलिन?
snippet.description:
sanjibini entertainment present- Sachin को आमाको समेत अर्कै श्रीमान रहेछन, धुरुधुरु रुदै खोलिन सबै बास्तबिकता, पहिला किन झुट बोलिन? Sachin Pariyar Mother Interview Sachin Pariyar Family Sachin Pariyar and Mother Sachin Pariyar Mother Kathmandu

Host- Santosh Paudel
Camera- Sanjaya Pokharel 

हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ,
 के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर +9779808074106 सन्तोष पौडेल लाइ सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौ l  

एस च्यानल मा रहेका कुनै पनि गित सङ्गीत लगायत भिडीयो डाउन्लोड अथवा कपी गरेर अर्को च्यानल मा राखेको या डाउन्लोड गरी फेसबुकमा अप्लोड गरेको पाइयमा प्रचलीत एन अनुसार कडा भन्दा कडा कार्बाही गरीनेछ।

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Ultaa Paailaa [Official Lyrical Video Release]
snippet.description:
Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Ultaa Paailaa'.

'Ultaa Paailaa' is a story of circumstance. It is a moment of realization of the inevitable end of love you are forced to step away from. With it, you forever carry the weight of acceptance of what could have been but did not. A unity created and separated by time.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

Artwork by: Kailash Subedi (@kailashs)

The Downtown Flux team for 'Ultaa Paailaa':
Kailash Subedi
Nurbu Lama
Sajjan Raj Vaidya
Saumya Karki
Sharif Shrestha

Visit our website: https://www.sajjanrajvaidya.com/​

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat

Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: को हुन Sachin Pariyar लाई जन्मदीने आमा? प्रस्न गर्दा पहिलोपटक रोय सचिन, परीवार नै एकसाथ मिडियामा
snippet.description:
sanjibini entertainment present- को हुन Sachin Pariyar लाई जन्मदीने आमा? प्रस्न गर्दा पहिलोपटक रोय सचिन, परीवार नै एकसाथ मिडियामा Sachin Pariyar family Sachin Pariyar Mother Sachin Pariyar Father Sachin Pariyar New Video

Host- Santosh Paudel
Camera- Sanjaya Pokharel 

हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ,
 के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर +9779808074106 सन्तोष पौडेल लाइ सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौ l  

एस च्यानल मा रहेका कुनै पनि गित सङ्गीत लगायत भिडीयो डाउन्लोड अथवा कपी गरेर अर्को च्यानल मा राखेको या डाउन्लोड गरी फेसबुकमा अप्लोड गरेको पाइयमा प्रचलीत एन अनुसार कडा भन्दा कडा कार्बाही गरीनेछ।

 Available only:-

    Youtube chanal
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8to...
Don't Forget To Subscribe

snippet.title: Mystifying Glasses | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

People are supporting a lady over Domestic Violence and as the offence at the area go down with peace. There an incident takes place where an attack has been violated. People are rushing over the mystery of danger in the locality with the profound mystery of mystic goggles. What is happening around? Where is the Culprit? What is the tragedy behind mysterious specs? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?
Find out, what happens next!

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha’s father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

en.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
en.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha’s father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: Z.D. Businessman (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 New South Hindi Dubbed Movies
snippet.description:
Movie Will Premiere At 7:30 PM

The movie follows the inspiring tale of an entrepreneur, Joy Thakolkaaran, who owns a firm named 'Punyalan Agarbathis'. The firm in involved in the production of incense sticks from elephant dung. The first half moves around how it becomes nearly impossible for him to acquire necessary raw material (elephant dung) and when he finally does acquire it devil follows him in the form of a hartal. Struggling between the deadline given by the court and the unexpected hartal, he decides to smuggle the raw material on the day of the hartal. When the RIP followers get wind of this they attack joy and destroy his godown and means of transportation. The rest of the movie revolves around how Joy is pressured with various problems around him and how help comes from the unexpected. The party uses different methods to mentally depreciate Joy. But he overcomes them by his optimistic attitude and his friends and family. In the end of the movie the tag line reads "you can conquer the whole world if you are ready to believe in yourself"

Click to Susbscribe Us: http://goo.gl/Bscph8

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM

snippet.title: Baarish Ki Jaaye | B Praak Ft Nawazuddin Siddiqui & Sunanda Sharma | Jaani | Arvindr Khaira | DM
snippet.description:
A Soulful melody of two hearts filled with love and emotions. #Baarishkijaaye where love will have a New meaning. The only way love can last a lifetime is if it's unconditional . The Nawazuddin Siddiqui and Sunandha Sharma is all set to take you all to there Dream world. The song is based on true story .

snippet.title: काजल जोशी र छत्र शाहीको पहिलो गीत | HAMRO JODI JAMCHHA | Chhatra Shahi & Kajal Joshi New Lok Dohori
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment presents Chhatra Shahi & Kajal Joshi first official new lok dohori music video song  "Hamro Jodi Jamchha" 2077/2021. The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi & Kajal Joshi are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years.

snippet.title: रियालाई प्रिन्स मन परेपछि Jodi Parewa, Prince Lamsal, Riya Khadka, Sarangi Sansar Live Dohori Ep 223
snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र पछिल्लो समयकी चर्चित लोक दोहोरी गायिका रिया खड्का बिचको निकै मिठो दोहोरी प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ । लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद । 

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: सिमान्त कथा । Simanta Katha - Herne Katha EP54 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
नेपाल  र भारतको पूर्वी सिमानामा डाँडाँकाँडा छिचोल्दै बग्छ  मेची नदी । मेची नदीकाे घुमाउराे लहरो पछ्याउँदै सिमानाका मान्छेहरु आउजाउ गर्छन् । इलामको सिमान्त गाउँका मान्छेहरु घोडा खच्चड  लिएर सौदा गर्न भारतको नक्सलबारी हाट झर्दा रहेछन् । हाटबाट  फर्किरहेका घोडचढीहरुलाई  हामीले मेची बगरमा भेट्यौं । र उनीहरुसँगै किनारै किनार उकालो लाग्यौं । 

#HerneKatha #SimantaKatha

Stories of people and villages in the mountains of Eastern Nepal bordering India.


Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝 Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 28 March 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJYELYkx/

snippet.title: सेन्मिखाको कथा । Senmikhako Katha । Herne  Katha EP52 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
वर्षौंपछि पनि याद आइरहने सेन्मिखालाई भेट्न हामी फेरि चखेवा गयौं । क्षितिजलाई अँगालो हालेर बसेको लोभलाग्दा डाँडा, सल्लाघारी अनि भेडा चर्ने पाटनहरु सम्झिँदै । अनि सम्झिँदै त्यो एकान्तमा वनपाखा गुन्जाउने सेन्मिखाका भाकाहरुलाई 
#Senmikha #HerneKatha

Story of Senmikha, a young shepherd  from Chakhewa, Bhojpur. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝  Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Best Of CID | सीआईडी | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman’s childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson’s kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

More Useful Links :
* Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
* Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
* Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/bt/app/sonyliv-live-cricket-tv-movies/id587794258?mt=8

snippet.title: MARJANEYA - Neha Kakkar | Rubina Dilaik & Abhinav Shukla | Anshul Garg | Babbu | Rajat Nagpal
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Marjaneya by Neha Kakkar ft. Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik.

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/marjaneya-single/1558134197?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=rmc8ijIKpxY&feature=share


Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh Chaukekar​ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla
